title: Clearwater Water Clarifier for Hot tub Spa and Swimming Water Treatment for Pristine Crystal Clear Water (1L)
features: Fast Acting Water Clarifier: For use with hot tubs, swimming pools and paddling pools for crystal clear water
Effectively Treats Cloudy Or Dull Looking Water: Which can be caused by dead algae, skin cells, dirt and grime
Transforms Unhygienic Environments: By binding tiny particles together so your filter can work more efficiently and remove the dirt/grime
Easy To Use: by simply pouring the recommended dose (stated clearly on the bottle) whilst the pump is turned on for efficient distribution
Clearwater is a BISHTA approved member and recommended by brands such as Bestway and Lay-Z-Spa for reliable, safe and high-quality water treatment
description: From the manufacturer ClearWater Clarifier is an extremely effective way to prevent hot tub water from looking dull and cloudy due to dead algae, skin cells and other dirt and grime that’s too small to be trapped by a filter system. The water clarifier contains flocculants ‑ chemicals that bind small particles of dirt together so that the filter system can successfully trap them. These tiny particles of dirt can make the water look cloudy and uninviting. Over time they can also make the water unhygienic.
